title: CACHEUS — Fully Adaptive Cache Replacement
summary_zh: 擴展 LeCaR 至完全自適應，透過 gradient-based stochastic hill climbing 消除所有靜態超參數。引入工作負載分類和 SR-LRU/CR-LFU 新 expert。在 329 工作負載上的 17,766 次模擬中評估。
summary_en: Extends LeCaR to fully adaptive, eliminating all static hyperparameters via gradient-based stochastic hill climbing. Introduces workload classification and new SR-LRU/CR-LFU experts. Evaluated across 17,766 simulations on 329 workloads.
